description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.9.12 Docker image and the librespace/kaitai:0.10 image for Kaitai compilation. Define stages compile, static, build, test, deploy, trigger, and security. In the compile stage add a compile job that runs "/usr/bin/ksc --target python --outdir satnogsdecoders/decoder ksy/*.ksy", stores the generated satnogsdecoders/decoder directory as an artifact for 1 week, and has no dependencies. In the static stage add a static job that runs "pip install -cconstraints.txt tox" then "tox run-parallel -e \"yamllint,flake8,isort,yapf,pylint\"" and depends on compile artifacts. In the build stage add a build job that runs "pip install -cconstraints.txt tox", removes the dist directory, runs "tox run -e \"build\"", and publishes the dist folder as an artifact for 1 week, requiring compile artifacts. In the test stage add a deps job ("tox run -e \"deps\"") and a test job ("tox run -e \"pytest\"") each with the same before_script and depending on compile artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs "pip install -cconstraints.txt tox", removes dist, runs "tox run -e \"upload\"" and only executes on tag pushes when $PYPI_USERNAME and $PYPI_PASSWORD are present, publishing the package to PyPI. Finally, add a trigger job that runs only on tag pushes when $PIPELINE_TRIGGERS is set, passing $CI_COMMIT_TAG and $SATNOGS_DB_GIT_URL as variables, and include security jobs (dependency_scanning, sast, secret_detection) that depend on compile artifacts.
